title: Pocky's Vanilla
description:
Pocky's Vannila Minecraft Pack.

This pack adds QOL Mods for Pocky's Minecraft server. To make the game look and play better!
body:
# **Pocky's Vanilla Pack**
This mod pack adds a lot of QOL mods to vanilla Minecraft to make the Vanilla Minecraft experience run and look better. 

An optional modpack for Pocky's Minecraft Server


## **Some Mods Included**

- Iris Shaders
- 3D Skin Layers
- Better F3
- Mouse Tweaks
- Shulker ToolTips
- Sodium
  - Sodium Extras
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Litematica
- Simple Vociechat

## **Some Included Shaders**

- Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
- Bliss Shaders 
- Photon Shaders

*Feel free to add anything you want*
